generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people support strategic autonomy, but have we really thought this through? As a mom who's seen how quickly things can change, I worry about leaving ourselves vulnerable. Our allies have been reliable partners for decades - why risk our security on untested solutions? The experts I trust say this could backfire, making us less safe in the long run. #NationalSecurityFirst #ThinkBeforeYouLeap
